name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: second invocation with the same inputs reports cache_status=hit so ~0 tokens land in H-1 transparency
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>err.txt; grep -q '"cache_status":"hit"' err.txt && echo second_hit 1>&2
